issues.description: Action type 'Rest' is incorrect. Effect text says 'negate the effect' of opponent's Leader, which requires a negation mechanic, not Rest. Current DSL lacks proper negation action.
Action type 'Rest' is incorrect. Effect text says 'negate the effect' and 'cannot attack until end of opponent's next turn' — requires negation + attack prevention, not simple Rest.
Missing condition to check if 'this Character was played on this turn'. Current DSL only checks Leader type, not play timing requirement.
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is incomplete. Should specify 'up to 1' in the action parameters or target definition.
Duration missing. Text states 'during this turn' (for Leader negation) and 'until end of opponent's next turn' (for Character negation) — requires explicit duration handling for the second part.
